headline: Oil shock lifts BofA outlook on US energy
summary: A supply shock rippling through global energy markets is reshaping the outlook for oil prices and US producers, as disruptions at the Strait of Hormuz force a sharp rethink of supply, inventories and valuations, according to Bank of America. The bank said it now expects Brent crude to average...
